description: A lab result is questionable or inconsistent with the patient's clinical picture. A lab supervisor decides to rerun the test.

nodes.task_description: Locate the original test result in the LIS.

expected_outcome.value: Supervisor finds the result that needs to be re-tested.

nodes.task_description: Add a new order for the same test on the existing specimen.

expected_outcome.value: A new order is created to track the rerun.

nodes.task_description: Process the specimen again and enter the new result, which will be marked as a corrected result.

expected_outcome.value: The test is rerun, and the new, accurate result replaces the old one, with a full audit trail.
